description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named HLWM CI that runs on push to master and on pull requests, ignoring changes to .mergify.yml. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-test-current, build-clang, build-old-32bit, diff-objects, and build-doc. Each job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a specific container and performs various tasks such as checking out code, caching, building, testing, and uploading artifacts.
